title: cymbopogon reflexus
intro: Cymbopogon reflexus, also known as East Indian lemongrass, is a species of grass native to India and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Poaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Cymbopogon reflexus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Cymbopogon reflexus can be prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or powder, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
